backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing survey backend with user profiles, OTP verification, survey submission with extended fields (age, experience, payment mode, location details), access control, and admin analytics endpoints.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two translation fixes: wrapping draft dialog keys in t() function (ResumeDraftDialog.tsx) and fixing raw translation keys across survey wizard components (ProgressIndicator.tsx).
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend source files describing React components, hooks, translations, survey wizard steps, and admin features with their current implementation state.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme color schemes using oklch color space for UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the mobile-first gig worker survey application.
frontend/src/admin/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying survey analytics cards (total submissions, verified/unverified counts, completion rate), category breakdown with translated labels, navigation to logs, and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/admin/AdminRouteGuard.tsx: Route guard component that checks Internet Identity authentication and admin status, showing access denied screen or loading spinner when appropriate.
frontend/src/admin/ExportCsvButton.tsx: Button component that exports survey data to CSV with translated category labels and all survey fields including new location and employment details.
frontend/src/admin/OtpLogsView.tsx: Admin view for displaying OTP logs with phone number filtering, showing timestamp, phone number, and success/failure status in a table.
frontend/src/admin/SmsOutboxView.tsx: Admin view for displaying SMS outbox payloads with phone filtering, showing message type, content, and timestamp sorted by most recent.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for survey wizard, success page, and admin views (dashboard, OTP logs, SMS outbox), wrapped in theme and language providers.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays an access denied error screen with a shield icon and button to navigate back to the survey.
frontend/src/components/Auth/LoginButton: Button component for Internet Identity authentication that toggles between login/logout states and triggers the profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/Auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, preventing dismissal until completed.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSwitcher: Dropdown menu component for switching between English and Hindi languages using a globe icon.
frontend/src/components/Layout/Footer.ts: Footer component displaying copyright information and a link to Caffeine.ai with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Layout/Header.ts: Header component with logo, title, language switcher, login button, and conditional admin dashboard link for authorized users.
frontend/src/features/survey/components/: Reusable multi-select dropdown component with search functionality, displaying selected items as removable badges using Command and Popover UI components.
Phone number verification component that handles OTP generation, display, verification with rate limiting and cooldown timer, normalizing phone numbers to 10 digits.
Simple progress bar component that displays current step number and percentage completion for the survey wizard.
frontend/src/features/survey/draft/useDr: Custom hook for managing survey draft persistence in localStorage, providing save, load, clear, and check operations with error handling.
frontend/src/features/survey/options.ts: Configuration file defining dropdown options for categories, subcategories, languages, and Indian states with translation keys for internationalization.
frontend/src/features/survey/ResumeDraft: Alert dialog that prompts users to resume a saved draft or start over when an incomplete survey is detected.
frontend/src/features/survey/signature/S: Canvas-based signature capture component supporting mouse and touch input, with clear functionality and PNG export to data URL.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step1: Survey step 1 component that displays welcome message, consent checkbox, and a dialog with detailed privacy policy sections covering survey participation and optional priority token information.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step2: Survey step 2 alternative component that displays a notice explaining phone verification will be deferred, with benefits listed for completing the survey first.
Survey step 2 component that handles phone number input, OTP generation with cooldown timer, and OTP verification using mutation hooks, with phone number normalization and validation.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step3: Survey step 3 component that collects basic user details including full name, gender, age, education level, and spoken languages using form inputs and multi-select.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step4: Survey step 4 component that collects worker category information including primary category, subcategory (with dynamic options), custom category input, years of experience, and employment type using radio groups and selects.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step5: Survey step 5 component that collects work and income details including working days/hours, payment mode, income range (with daily/monthly variants), and work challenges using multi-select and form inputs.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step6: Survey step component for collecting residential address (state, city, pincode, area, panchayat, block) and service area information, with option to indicate if service area matches residential address.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step7: Survey step component for optional identity verification, collecting Aadhaar number (formatted with spaces), alternative ID type selection, and ID image file upload.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step8: Survey step component displaying consent text and providing a signature pad for users to digitally sign their agreement.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step9: Survey step component collecting smartphone type, internet access frequency, willingness to use app, expected benefits (multi-select), and future onboarding interest.
frontend/src/features/survey/SubmissionS: Success screen displaying survey submission confirmation with survey ID, timestamp, print option, and button to start a new survey.
frontend/src/features/survey/SurveyRevie: Final survey step for reviewing data, verifying phone with OTP, completing a CAPTCHA, and submitting the survey to the backend.
frontend/src/features/survey/SurveyWizar: Main survey wizard component that manages multi-step form navigation (9 steps plus review), draft saving/resuming, and validation logic for each step before allowing progression.
frontend/src/features/survey/types.ts: TypeScript type definitions for SurveyData interface covering all survey steps (consent, phone, demographics, work details, address, identity, signature, additional inputs) and initialSurveyData default values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, initializing access control with admin token, and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for backend API operations including OTP generation/verification, survey submission, analytics queries (verification stats, category analytics, completion stats), OTP/SMS logs, data export, and user profile management.
frontend/src/i18n/LanguageContext.tsx: React context provider for i18n that manages language state (en/hi) in localStorage and provides a translation function (t) that resolves dot-notation keys from the translations object.
frontend/src/i18n/translations/en.ts: English translation strings for the gig worker survey app, including common UI labels, step-specific content, privacy notices, and consent text for survey participation and optional priority token purchase.
frontend/src/i18n/translations/hi.ts: Hindi translation strings mirroring the English translations, providing localized content for all survey steps, privacy notices, and UI elements.
frontend/src/i18n/translations/index.ts: Exports a translations object containing en and hi language maps, and defines Language and TranslationKeys TypeScript types for type-safe i18n usage.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors using OKLCH color space, plus a fadeIn animation utility for step transitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup helpers for sensitive parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining custom color tokens using OKLCH variables, container settings, border radius utilities, animations for accordions, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state tracking a multilingual survey website for gig workers in India with OTP verification, step-by-step forms, admin analytics, and privacy compliance. Currently has critical issues: OTP/SMS delivery not working, and i18n translation keys displaying raw instead of translated values.
